ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "oi" INTEGER /* Open interest of the instrument */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the market data (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value of the trading signal */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trading signal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "signal_source" TEXT /* Source of the trading signal (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., RSI, CMO, MACD) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator (e.g., system, external) */,
  "indicator_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the technical indicator (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument type (e.g., derivative, equity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the instrument */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the price data (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sma_data" (
  "sma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMA entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the SMA entry */,
  "sma_20" REAL /* 20-period SMA of the instrument */,
  "sma_50" REAL /* 50-period SMA of the instrument */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the SMA data (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sma_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oi_data" (
  "oi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OI entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the OI entry */,
  "oi" INTEGER /* Open interest of the instrument */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the OI data (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oi_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_data" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume entry */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the volume data (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trading session took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
